A minor '''skirmish''' took place in the [[Froz system/Legends|Froz system]] in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], when a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] was seeking to acquire [[voxyn]] for study.

{{Battle-stub}}
